mapper.sql: id, transaction_no, wallet_no, customer_no, biz_type, transaction_type, amount, before_balance, after_balance, description, reference_no, reference_type, status, remark, create_time
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ds_wallet_transaction ( transaction_no, wallet_no, customer_no, biz_type, transaction_type, amount, before_balance, after_balance, description, reference_no, reference_type, status, remark, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.transactionNo}, #{item.walletNo}, #{item.customerNo}, #{item.bizType}, #{item.transactionType}, #{item.amount}, #{item.beforeBalance}, #{item.afterBalance}, #{item.description}, #{item.referenceNo}, #{item.referenceType}, #{item.status}, #{item.remark}, #{item.createTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ds_wallet_transaction WHERE reference_no = #{referenceNo} AND reference_no IS NOT NULL AND reference_no != ''
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM ds_wallet_transaction WHERE wallet_no = #{walletNo} AND status = 'SUCCESS'
